steps.title: Use the new evidence
steps.content: Scholars thought silk first spread beyond China in the second century CE. New evidence from South Asia shows people in the Indus Civilization used silk at least 1,000 years earlier, so it directly opposes the old view.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content: A says evidence investigated a belief, B says evidence misread a belief, and C says evidence anticipated a belief that already existed. The evidence instead conflicts with the prior timeline. The answer is D.
